\tzpentry{ID4859}{Permittivity Definition}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4859 introduces Permittivity Definition as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\\epsilon_M = \\left( \\frac{c^4}{8\\pi G} \\cdot \\frac{1}{Y_T} \\right) \\cdot \\exp\\left( \\frac{\\Phi_{\\text{TZP}}}{P_T} \\right) \\cdot \\chi_T \\equiv \\left[ \\frac{\\partial g_{\\mu\\nu}}{\\partial \\mathcal{M}^{\\mu\\nu}} \\right]_{\\text{Handshake}}$$
